blended.narrative: Hudson Bay Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.2 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 1,408 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 18°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
